channel.title: Europe Weekly
channel.description: Europe Weekly is an independent media project covering European politics, economics, and culture. Weekly articles and podcast.
channel.itunes:author: Europe Weekly

item.title: Germany, France, Belgium, Netherlands - France Opens Nuclear Deterrence to Europe...
item.description: France initiates a historic shift in nuclear doctrine, opening deterrence capabilities to European allies. Germany commits to Europe's strongest conventional army amid a Franco-German security pivot.

item.title: Poland, Latvia, Lithuania, Estonia - Poland Faces Russian Hybrid Onslaught...
item.description: Poland battles Russian hybrid warfare including sabotage and cyberattacks while Baltic states dramatically increase defense spending. Lithuania approves record 5.38% GDP defense budget.

item.title: Sweden, Denmark, Finland, Ireland - Sweden's 2026 Election: First Vote on NATO...
item.description: Sweden's upcoming election marks the first vote since abandoning 200 years of military non-alignment. Denmark faces snap election amid Greenland sovereignty tensions. Finland proposes lifting nuclear weapons ban.

item.title: Bulgaria, Slovenia, Romania, Croatia - EU Defense Spending Surge: Eastern Members...
item.description: Eastern EU members are dramatically increasing defense spending amid growing security concerns. Bulgaria, Slovenia, Romania, and Croatia accelerate military modernization efforts.
